bug_report.summary: URL bar zoom indicator pill (e.g., “110%”) missing after zooming page
steps_to_reproduce: Open any normal webpage (e.g., support.mozilla.org article).
Press Ctrl and + once to zoom in (to ~110%).
expected_behaviors: When the page zoom is not 100%, Firefox should show the zoom indicator pill (e.g., “110%”) in/near the address bar so users can see and reset zoom.
actual_behaviors: After zooming in, the zoom indicator pill is not shown in the address bar area (it appears in the before screenshot but is absent in the after screenshot).

bug_report.summary: Ctrl++ zoom-in does not advance to the next zoom level (stays at 110% instead of 120%)
steps_to_reproduce: Press Ctrl and + again (second zoom-in step).
expected_behaviors: Zoom percentage indicator should advance from 110% to 120% on the second Ctrl++ press.
actual_behaviors: Zoom indicator remains at 110% after the second Ctrl++ press (before-change shows 120% for the same step).

bug_report.summary: Notifications “Settings – Notification Permissions” dialog: permissions list area collapses/disappears at increased zoom
steps_to_reproduce: Open Firefox with a fresh profile.
Increase zoom (e.g., Ctrl++ three times to ~130%).
In Permissions, open Notifications → “Settings…”. (Scroll if needed)
expected_behaviors: Dialog should show the permissions list area (even if empty) with a visible list region that uses available space appropriately.
Dialog controls (Remove Website/Remove All Websites, checkbox text, footer buttons) should not compress the list away.
actual_behaviors: The main permissions list region is effectively missing/collapsed: only the column headers are visible and the action buttons/checkbox area move up, leaving no visible list box area to view/manage entries.
